mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, order_no, product_id, sku_id, product_name, sku_name, product_image, price, quantity, total_price, create_time, update_time FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, order_id, order_no, product_id, sku_id, product_name, sku_name, product_image, price, quantity, total_price, create_time, update_time FROM order_item WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, order_no, product_id, sku_id, product_name, sku_name, product_image, price, quantity, total_price) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.productId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.skuName}, #{item.productImage}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.totalPrice})
